title: Showing names and making “From” and “To” clearer in Mail & Activity would make conversations easier to follow.
excerpt:
Description
In Mail & Activity, it would be clearer if names (instead of only email addresses) were shown, and if the “From” and “To” fields were easier to distinguish.

posts.author: RyotaroTakano (Ryotaro Takano)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

In Mail & Activity, it would be clearer if names (instead of only email addresses) were shown, and if the “From” and “To” fields were easier to distinguish.

What are you trying to achieve

Make Mail & Activity conversations easier to follow.
